<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of phpunit/php-code-coverage. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace SebastianBergmann\CodeCoverage\Report; use const PHP_EOL; use function serialize; use SebastianBergmann\CodeCoverage\CodeCoverage; use SebastianBergmann\CodeCoverage\Driver\WriteOperationFailedException; use SebastianBergmann\CodeCoverage\Util\Filesystem; final class PHP { /** * @param null|non-empty-string $target * * @throws WriteOperationFailedException */ public function process(CodeCoverage $coverage, ?string $target = null): string { $coverage->clearCache(); $buffer = "<?php return \unserialize(<<<'END_OF_COVERAGE_SERIALIZATION'" . PHP_EOL . serialize($coverage) . PHP_EOL . 'END_OF_COVERAGE_SERIALIZATION' . PHP_EOL . ');'; if ($target !== null) { Filesystem::write($target, $buffer); } return $buffer; } }
